sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3516" key="a)krobare/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-βαρέω</orth>, <sense id="n3516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become top-heavy, lose balance by being overloaded at the extremity</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:164:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">164.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:166:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">166.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
